name: QA 1175
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1175

Exercise the BCC PMDA dynamic process filtering.



Copyright (c) 2018-2019 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404 reproduce
